'''Leeper''' was [[Bama Vook]]'s [[LE-PR34 navigator droid]].

==History==
Leeper accompanied Bama as co-pilot of his ship, the ''[[Metron Burner]]—''a [[YT-1300 light freighter|Corellian YT-1300 freighter]]. The droid had an endearing habit of properly identifying and naming all machinery that he came across. This odd obsession came into providential use when he spotted [[X10-D draft droid|X-10D ''draft droids'']] used by [[Bartokk]] [[Assassin/Legends|assassins]] in a plot masterminded by [[Groodo]] the Hutt to destroy the [[Corulag Academy]], thus aiding the plot's foil by the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] team of [[Noro Zak]], [[Vel Ardox]], [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]], [[Qui-Gon Jinn/Legends|Qui-Gon Jinn]], [[Adi Gallia]], [[Yoda/Legends|Yoda]] and [[Mace Windu/Legends|Mace Windu]].

Bama, a [[Talz]] test-pilot for [[Trinkatta Starships]] of [[Esseles/Legends|Esseles]], became unwittingly entangled in separate schemes hatched by the [[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation]] and the Bartokks. After a ''hyperdrive prototype engine'' was delivered to Trinkatta by Groodo the Hutt—on behalf of the [[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation]] for its [[Palpatine/Legends|Darth Sidious]]-inspired scheme to overtake the strategic cross-roads planet [[Brentaal IV/Legends|Brentaal]] and thereby rule two major galactic trade routes, the [[Perlemian Trade Route/Legends|Perlemian]] and the [[Hydian Way/Legends|Hydian]]—Groodo turned on the [[Neimoidian/Legends|Neimoidians]] when they refused to pay him. The Hutt did this by hiring the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim's]] infamous [[Bartokk|insectoid assassins]] to steal 50 of Trinkatta's [[Vulture-class starfighter/Legends|''Vulture''-class droid starfighters]]—at least some of which had already been modified and equipped with Groodo's illegal hyperdrive prototype. By creating an alliance with the [[Bartokk Queen]] and her minions, Groodo hoped not only to ruin the Federation's business plans, but also to wreak vengeance upon the Jedi, who had not admitted his [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] son [[Boonda/Legends|Boonda]] to the Academy on [[Corulag/Legends|Corulag]].

After meeting up with Jedi [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]] Obi-Wan Kenobi and his master Qui-Gon Jinn, Leeper helped rescue Bama on Esseles. He then aided the Jedi in defeating, at a local spaceport, a Bartokk squad that had kidnapped Bama's son, [[Chup-Chup]]. The [[Talz/Legends|Talz]] pilot and his navigator droid later accompanied the Jedi to Corulag and once again proved invaluable by alerting the Jedi, whose numbers now also included [[Jedi High Council/Legends|Jedi High Councilors]] Mace Windu and Yoda, of the Bartokk presence at Corulag Academy in [[Curamelle/Legends|Curamelle]]. The [[Hive mind/Legends|Hive-minded]] assassins, led by their Queen, were intent on using six hulking [[X10-D]] droids—three of which harbored [[Plasma bomb/Legends|plasma bombs]]—to blow up the academy before fleeing [[Curamelle/Legends|the capital city]] in their stolen [[Personal Luxury Yacht 3000/Legends|SoroSuub ''space yacht'']]'','' back to their unnamed hive-planet near the [[Corporate Sector/Legends|Corporate Sector]].

*''[[Episode I Adventures 3: The Fury of Darth Maul]]''
